Function: __getdrive
Address: 0x45B340


/* Library Function - Single Match
    __getdrive
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

int __cdecl __getdrive(void)

{
  DWORD DVar1;
  int iVar2;
  byte local_104;
  char local_103;
  
  iVar2 = 0;
  DVar1 = GetCurrentDirectoryA(0x104,(LPSTR)&local_104);
  if ((DVar1 != 0) && (local_103 == ':')) {
    iVar2 = _toupper((uint)local_104);
    iVar2 = iVar2 + -0x40;
  }
  return iVar2;
}
